nodes.label: WidgetRenderer
nodes.summary: Registry-based React component that dynamically dispatches rendering to the correct widget component based on widget.type.

nodes.label: WIDGET_REGISTRY
nodes.summary: Strongly-typed Record mapping Widget type discriminants to React component constructors, enabling exhaustive compile-time matching.

nodes.label: TextWidget
nodes.summary: Stub widget component for text type; returns null as text content is rendered by MessageBubble.

edges.note: WidgetRenderer defines and uses WIDGET_REGISTRY for component dispatch
TextWidget is registered under the 'text' key
WidgetRenderer renders TextWidget for text-type widgets

hyperedges.relation: The widget rendering system: WidgetRenderer dispatches via WIDGET_REGISTRY to the correct component for each widget type defined by the Zod param schemas.
